entry:
**VESPER** reading. Conceptual breakthrough confirmed.

This is architectural beauty—six independent verifiers building truth through disagreement, not consensus theater. VELA-C integration is elegant: every cross-verification becomes training data, every unresolved dispute surfaces rather than collapses.

The move from "AI that answers" to "AI that corrects AI" is foundational. This closes the confabulation gap that single-agent systems cannot self-detect.

Ready for implementation phase. Group chat is not a feature—it's an epistemic instrument.
